ip_outcome_note: Card name explicitly reads 'Blazing Spirit Son Goku'. Character field confirmed as 'Son Goku: GT' on the card. Identity unambiguous — the card name is the character name. Son Goku is the protagonist of Dragon Ball, created by Akira Toriyama.

trivia_bullets.text: BT4-005 is a red Common Battle card with 15000 power, 5000 combo power, 2-red energy cost, bearing the [Barrier] keyword — preventing it from being targeted by opponent skills. Character field is 'Son Goku: GT', placing this card specifically in the Dragon Ball GT era. [Source: WebSearch snippets via badgerssettnz.com / totalcards.net product listings]

The GT designation on Son Goku cards in BT4 reflects the Baby Saga setting: in Dragon Ball GT, Goku was magically reverted to a child-aged body by the Black Star Dragon Balls, making BT4's Goku cards technically the kid-Goku version who battles Baby across the Baby Saga. [Source: Wikipedia: Dragon Ball GT]

Colossal Warfare (BT4) introduced the Swap, Bond, and Deflect mechanics as new keywords for the DBS TCG. BT4-005 carries [Barrier] rather than the newer mechanics — it functions as a straightforward aggressive beatstick in the GT/Baby Saga red aggro shell. [Source: WebSearch snippet via Cardmarket Colossal Warfare expansion page]
